summary: Desktop release workflow created a tag release without uploading platform binaries, leaving only GitHub source archives visible on the release page.
impact: Users could not download Windows .exe or macOS .dmg installers directly from the release assets list.
fix: Updated .github/workflows/desktop-release.yml to fail fast when expected .dmg/.exe bundles are missing and to publish assets with gh release upload --clobber so binaries are attached to existing or newly created releases.
lessons: Add explicit asset validation and deterministic release upload steps so CI failures are obvious and release pages always include installer artifacts.
